title: ceratophyllum demersum var. demersum
intro: Ceratophyllum demersum var. demersum, commonly known as the hornwort or coontail, is a type of aquatic plant belonging to the family Ceratophyllaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antibacterial properties. The health benefits of hornwort include its ability to aid in wound healing, reduce fever, and alleviate symptoms of respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. Hornwort can be prepared as a tea or infusion by steeping the plant in hot water, and it is also sometimes used in salves and creams for topical application.
